title: Faithful Font for GUI Scale 3x
description: Basic support for Faithful font that looks sharp on GUI Scale 3x
body:
## This is not a Faithful pack, but a small Font addon for GUI Scale 3x

![comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3b560ddb1e0f76f1935151408a525b424d92993.png)

This is a small pack that makes the font in the Faithful packs 48x, meaning it is a middle between Faithful 32x and 64x, but also works well with GUI Scale 3x and looks sharper compared to using any of the official fonts from the official packs.

Curseforge mirror coming soon!

## Note

I will also make a GUI pack to go along with this font at some point, to fix artifacts on buttons and interfaces on GUI Scale 3x sometime in the future.

As of 1.8 and up (including **LATEST** version, **26.1**), all unicode textures are supported!

## Check out my SharpFonts packs!
- [GUI Scale 3x SharpFonts pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sharp-fonts-48x)

![sharpfonts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74c26cbcf25e6a6f49620ecc86a3d1998affbb8d_0.webp)
